scope.question: Review source fidelity for the D+Q bone source-rights seed candidate before registry text ingestion.

inputs.summary: Submitted rights-classification candidate covering the D+Q bone ClinicalTrials.gov and PubMed sources.
Source-rights operating rules for artifact retention, attribution, public export, and remediation.

outputs.summary: Completed source-fidelity supervisor review for the D+Q bone source-rights seed candidate, linked the accepting review, and moved the candidate to in_review.

proposed_records.rationale: Moved the rights seed candidate to in_review and linked the accepting source-fidelity supervisor review.
Records the completed source-fidelity supervisor review for the source-rights candidate.

quality_checks.summary: The source-rights candidate now has one active complete source_fidelity review with verdict accept and blocking false.
The review preserves the public_registry boundary for ClinicalTrials.gov and the metadata_only boundary for the PubMed/publisher article source.
npm run verify:knowledge-base passed after review linkage and export refresh.

next_actions: Use the accepted source-fidelity review state to proceed with ClinicalTrials.gov registry text-snapshot ingestion.
Leave rights promotion to a separate promotion step if accepted-record export policy needs it.
